title: Surprise "perk" of chemo
body:
I've had deep plantar warts covering my left foot for over a decade, no treatment worked. A month after starting chemo, they all peeled off and the skin is now smooth and clear! It felt nice seeing evidence that the drugs were killing off all the HPV virus in my body, which means they were being very effective at stopping DNA replication. 

Did you have any unexpected benefits or positive side effects of cancer treatment?
